name: Glenda Timola
title: Real Estate Professional
tagline: Helping you find the perfect home in Cebu — with trust, expertise, and a personal touch.
description: Glenda Timola is a trusted real estate professional based in Cebu, Philippines, specializing in condo sales across Cebu City, Mandaue, Lapu-Lapu, and Mactan Island. With years of experience in the Cebu property market, she helps buyers find the perfect condo — from starter studios to luxury units.
